item.title: Ring-Zero：将零 RL 扩展到万亿个参数以进行紧急推理
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12395v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards without human-annotated data, often referred to as zero RL, has emerged as a powerful paradigm for eliciting chain-of-thought reasoning.
